subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hearest the cry of Him Who is wronged when He was oppressed at the hands of the heedless ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تسمع ندآء المظلوم اذ کان مقهورا بین ایدی الغافلین من
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @living waters; water of life
